SourceProxy.name: SHYXRepairDegeneracies
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Repair Degeneracies (CGAL)

Documentation.short_help: Remove degenerate and almost-degenerate triangles (CGAL PMP).

SourceProxy.Documentation: CGAL Polygon_mesh_processing from repair_degeneracies.h: remove_degenerate_faces (zero-length edges, collinear triangles) and optionally remove_almost_degenerate_faces (caps and needles). Triangle vtkPolyData only. Named-parameter defaults match CGAL (cap ~160°, needle ratio 4). Preserve genus applies to the degenerate-edge removal step inside remove_degenerate_faces. Port 0: repaired mesh. Port 1: VTK_TRIANGLE cells for targeted regions — SHYX_RepairRegion 1 = exact degenerate on input; if "Remove almost degenerate" is on, 2 = needle, 3 = cap, 4 = both (faces on the mesh after remove_degenerate_faces, before remove_almost_degenerate_faces).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: CapThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Cap Threshold (cosine)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Cosine of minimum angle; faces with a larger angle are caps. CGAL default is cos(160°).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: NeedleThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Needle Threshold (edge length ratio)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Longest/shortest edge ratio above which a face is treated as a needle.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: CollapseLengthThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Collapse Max Edge Length (0=off)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: If non-zero, do not collapse edges longer than this value.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FlipTriangleHeightThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Flip Max Triangle Height (0=off)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: If non-zero, skip edge flips when triangle height exceeds this threshold.
